name: ExtensionNutritionProduct_Ingredient
title: R5: Ingredients contained in this product (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionProduct.ingredient` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionProduct.ingredient` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NutritionProduct.ingredient` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionProduct.ingredient` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `NutritionProduct` is not mapped.
Element `NutritionProduct.ingredient` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
